Abbas Araghchi on Monday met Russian President Vladimir Putin in St. Petersburg, according to Russian news agencies.\n\nPresident Putin said he had received a message from Iran’s Supreme Leader and conveyed his best wishes, asking Araghchi to pass them along.\n\nHe expressed hope that the Iranian people would overcome the current difficult period and that peace would be established in the
